Query
  Pipeline
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
          WhereCond
            Binary >=
              Ident status
              Int 500
          Alias errors
        Agg
          Call count
          WhereCond
            Binary <
              Ident status
              Int 400
          Alias success
        Agg
          Call count
          Alias total
